panels.description: Displays the percentage of encrypted Objects, system wide
panels.title: Encrypted Objects

panels.description: The total number of un-encrypted objects
panels.title: Total Un-Encrypted Objects

panels.description: Checks the Health of the EXTERNAL KMS (Key Management Server) - e.g all are online
panels.title: External KMS Health

panels.description: Total number of re-keys initiated on the system.  Each Rekey will replace the Active KEKs stored in the primary KMS.
panels.title: Admin Initiated Rekey

panels.description: Displays the number of KEK (Key encryption Keys) stored in each Key Management Server.  The table is updated once per hour.
panels.title: KEKs per Server

panels.description: Checks whether DLS (Data-Lifecycle Service) is examining objects for REKEY policy. UNHEALTHY indicates that no activity was detected in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: DLS: Rekey policy

panels.description: Total number DEKs that were re-encrypted
panels.title: Total DEKs Re-Encrypted

panels.description: The total number of encrypted objects
panels.title: Total Encrypted Objects

panels.description: Total number of KEKs (Key Encryption Keys) defined in all KMS.  There is at least one KEK version for each storage component.  Each re-key event will create a new KEK version for each storage component.
panels.title: Total KEKs

panels.description: Total number DLS (data lifecycle Service) jobs running on the system
panels.title: DLS service jobs

panels.description:
(REKEY#) = Marks an Initiate Rekey Event.
(SCAN#) = Marks the beginning of a new Lifecycle scan.  Each new Session will run until completion.  Checked once every hour
panels.title: Admin Initiated Rekey

panels.description: Shows  the rate at which DEKs (Data Encryption Keys) examined, old DEKs found, and DEKs re-encrypted per second.
panels.title: Rekey: Object Examination Rate

panels.description: Stacked histogram shows time spent examining DEKs for re-key decision. (latency)
panels.title: Rekey: Latency (Histogram)

panels.description: The number of DEKs Examined by each node instance
panels.title: Rekey: DEK Examination Rate (by Node)

panels.description: The number of re-encrypted DEKs by each node instance
panels.title: Rekey: DEK Re-Encryption Rate (by Node)

list.description: Choose a Cluster to Connect and Display
list.label: Choose  Cluster
list.name: ClusterName

title: HCP for Cloud Scale - Dashboard 7: Encryption Activity
